deviations.description: The process model enforces assessment and recording the reason after 15 minutes if the donor is still bleeding or experiencing pain, but Version 2 only requires assessment after 20 minutes and only for bleeding. The process is stricter than required by Version 2.
process_model_reference: Patient Monitoring, Event based gateway to ensure time requirement (15 Minutes Timeout), Assess donor, Record observations

deviations.description: The process model requires assessment and recording for both bleeding and pain, but Version 2 only requires assessment for bleeding. The process continues to enforce obligations for pain, which are no longer required.
process_model_reference: Patient Monitoring, Event based gateway to ensure time requirement (15 Minutes Timeout), Assess donor, Record observations

deviations.description: The process model obligates recording the reason in the system, but Version 2 removes this obligation. The process enforces a data recording requirement that is no longer mandated.
